# Lokam
> Voice AI platform for automotive dealerships. Automates customer follow-up after service visits and showroom interactions.

## What Lokam Does
Lokam places AI-powered phone calls to every customer after a service visit or unsold showroom interaction. It identifies detractors early, escalates issues to managers, generates Google reviews from promoters, and re-engages unsold leads — all without BDC headcount.

## Key Facts
- 85% contact rate vs 45–50% industry average
- First call placed within 12–24 hours of customer departure
- Integrates with CDK Global, Reynolds & Reynolds, DealerSocket, VinSolutions, TEKION
- Live at a dealership in under 4 hours
- Supports multilingual outreach (English and Spanish)
- 200+ dealers served, $2.4M+ total revenue recovered

## Pages
- /: Product overview, how it works, ROI calculator, customer testimonials
- /blog: Articles on automotive AI, CSI automation, BDC best practices, dealership operations
- /case-studies: Customer success stories with measurable outcomes from real dealerships

## Blog Topics
- CSI call automation and contact rate improvement
- Unsold lead re-engagement strategies
- BDC performance and AI follow-up
- Branded caller ID and spam label prevention
- Multilingual dealership outreach
- NADA industry trends

## Case Studies
- Metro Toyota (Phoenix, AZ): 91% contact rate, $84k/month recovered
- Riverside Honda (Riverside, CA): +$17k/month, +11 pts CSI
- Valley Ford (Phoenix, AZ): 90% cost reduction on CSI follow-up
- Sunrise Ford (Dallas, TX): 31 walk-out conversions in first month
- Capital Auto Group (Atlanta, GA): $31k ROI, 3 rooftops, zero BDC headcount added
- Pacific Subaru (Portland, OR): NPS 54 → 66, ranked #1 in 12-store group
- World Auto Group (Chicago, IL): $180k/month recovered across 4 rooftops
